about.title: Fashion That Honors Who You Are
about.p1: Tichel & Co. was born from a simple belief: that head coverings should be as beautiful as the women who wear them. We saw a gap in the market — observant women who wanted luxury fashion that respected their values, not compromised on them.
about.p2: Every piece in our collection is designed in Israel and crafted from the finest fabrics — silk, cashmere, velvet, and linen. We work with artisan manufacturers who share our commitment to quality and attention to detail.
about.p3: Our mission goes beyond fashion. We believe that covering your head is an act of strength and beauty. Our designs celebrate that choice with elegance, sophistication, and joy.
about.value1Text: Every piece is crafted from premium fabrics with meticulous attention to detail. We never compromise on quality.
about.value2Text: We design for women who cover with intention. Every item celebrates modesty as a source of beauty and strength.
about.value3Text: We work with ethical manufacturers and use sustainable materials wherever possible. Fashion should respect the earth too.

careGuide.title: Care Guide
careGuide.subtitle: How to care for your Tichel & Co. pieces to ensure they stay beautiful for years.
careGuide.silkText: Hand wash in cool water with mild detergent. Do not wring. Lay flat to dry away from direct sunlight. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth.
careGuide.velvetText: Dry clean recommended. To refresh between cleanings, steam gently on the reverse side. Store hanging or rolled, never folded.
careGuide.cashmereText: Hand wash in lukewarm water with cashmere-specific detergent. Gently squeeze — never twist. Reshape and lay flat to dry on a towel.
careGuide.linenText: Machine wash on delicate cycle in cool water. Tumble dry on low or hang to dry. Iron while slightly damp for a crisp finish.
careGuide.cottonText: Machine wash warm on gentle cycle. Tumble dry low. Iron on medium heat. Our cotton pieces are pre-shrunk for consistent fit.
careGuide.generalText: Store your head coverings in a cool, dry place. Use a fabric bag for delicate items. Avoid contact with perfume and hairspray.

privacy.collectText: We collect personal information you provide when creating an account, placing an order, or contacting us. This includes your name, email address, shipping address, and payment information. Payment details are processed securely by Stripe and are never stored on our servers.
privacy.useText: We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, send order updates, and improve our services. With your consent, we may send promotional emails about new collections and offers. You can unsubscribe at any time.
privacy.shareText: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We share data only with service providers who help us operate our business: Stripe for payments, Firebase for authentication and data storage, and shipping carriers for delivery.
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and shopping cart. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors use our site. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also request a copy of your data or ask us to restrict its processing. Contact us at privacy@tichel.co for any data-related requests.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related inquiries, please email privacy@tichel.co. We aim to respond within 5 business days.

terms.generalText: By using this website and placing orders, you agree to these terms of service. Tichel & Co. reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.productsText: All products are handcrafted and may have slight variations in color and texture. Prices are listed in Israeli Shekels (ILS) and include VAT where applicable. We reserve the right to update prices without prior notice.
terms.paymentText: We accept credit and debit cards processed securely through Stripe. Payment is charged at the time of order placement. All transactions are encrypted and secured.
terms.shippingText: We ship throughout Israel and internationally. Standard delivery within Israel takes 3-5 business days. International shipping takes 7-14 business days. Free shipping on orders over ₪260.
terms.liabilityText: Tichel & Co. is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our products or services. Our total liability is limited to the purchase price of the product in question.
terms.governingText: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Israel. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Tel Aviv-Jaffa.

returns.policyText: We want you to love your Tichel & Co. purchase. If you're not completely satisfied, you may return unworn items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange.
returns.eligibleText: Items must be in their original condition — unworn, unwashed, and with tags attached. Custom-made pieces and items marked as final sale are not eligible for return.
returns.processText: Email returns@tichel.co with your order number and reason for return. We'll send you a prepaid return label within 1-2 business days. Pack the item securely and drop it off at any post office.
returns.refundText: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
returns.exchangeText: To exchange an item for a different color or size, follow the return process and place a new order. If you need help finding the right alternative, our team is happy to assist.
returns.contactText: Contact our customer service at returns@tichel.co or call us during business hours. We're here to make sure you're happy with your purchase.
